calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-31-2012 Off Calendar

Ntc Of Default Prove-Up Hearing And Mtn For Entry Of Default Judgment; Req. For Judicial Ntc And Copies In Lieu Of Originals
Off Calendar Sep-27-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Ksenia Tsenin, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sarah Lerschen #6213.
Matthew Learned, Esq. appeared for the plaintiff Citifinancial Mortgage Company, Inc.
Order waiving appearance of live witness is in the court's file

No appearance by defaulted defendants Katia Bonilla and the testate and intestate successors of Esperanza Mejia, deceased.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants for Deed of Trust executed on 05-07-04 be reinstated as a valid first priority, fully enforceable against the real property of 271 Otsego Ave., San Francisco. See scanned doc for details of the judgment.
Judgemnt was submitted and signed in open court.
